overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit back office or storage room in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring rows of filing cabinets, a cluttered work desk with futuristic computer equipment, and industrial decor. The player character moves slowly through the space, examining details of the environment with a flashlight or ambient green-tinted lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow office corridor with filing cabinets

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the office aisle, observing the filing cabinets and desk area

entered.detail: tall gray metal filing cabinets with multiple drawers lining the right wall
rotating ceiling fan with central light fixture illuminating the room
cluttered work desk with computer equipment and boxes
green illuminated exit sign above the doorway
large dark whiteboard or screen on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through a narrow, dimly lit office corridor. Metal filing cabinets line the right side while a cluttered work desk becomes visible on the left. A ceiling fan with light rotates overhead, and a green exit sign glows in the distance.

events.description: camera turns left toward the desk area, shifting focus from the corridor to the workstation

agents.ego_description: turning toward the desk to examine the computer equipment and boxes on the work surface

entered.detail: white rolling office stool with red seat near the desk
futuristic laptop with yellow and black casing and illuminated keyboard
stacked cardboard boxes including one with Arasaka corporation branding
wall-mounted racks with hanging cables or tools
metal cabinet with tools and equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left toward a cluttered work desk, revealing a futuristic cyberpunk-style laptop, cardboard boxes with corporate branding, and wall-mounted tool racks. The lighting shifts to a mix of overhead and desk lamp illumination as the player approaches the workstation.

events.description: camera focuses on specific desk items including the Arasaka box and computer screen

agents.ego_description: closely examining the desk surface, focusing on the computer, boxes, and scattered papers

entered.detail: scattered papers and documents on the desk surface
small cup or mug next to the computer

segments.scene_description: The player examines the desk in close detail, focusing on a futuristic laptop with illuminated keys, an Arasaka-branded cardboard box, scattered papers, and wall-mounted cable racks. The camera pans across the cluttered work surface, revealing the intricate details of the cyberpunk office setup.

events.description: camera turns away from the desk and moves toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: turning away from the desk and walking toward the exit door at the far end of the room

entered.detail: dark door with small window panel leading out of the office
tall vending machine or locker unit with illuminated buttons near the exit
small trash receptacle near the filing cabinets

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the desk and moves toward the exit area, revealing a door with a small window and a vending machine against the wall. The lighting becomes darker as the camera approaches the exit, passing the filing cabinets once again on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dim, industrial office that shifts from a narrow corridor to a detailed workstation before retreating toward a dark exit. It begins by gliding past metal filing cabinets under a rotating ceiling fan, guided by the distant glow of a green exit sign. As the camera turns left, the environment opens up to a cluttered work desk where the lighting transitions from overhead shadows to the focused glow of a cyberpunk laptop and desk lamp. The view then lingers in close detail, panning across Arasaka-branded boxes, scattered papers, and wall-mounted cable racks to emphasize the intricate office setup. Finally, the camera turns away from the workstation and moves back into the shadows, passing the filing cabinets once more toward a vending machine and a door with a small window.
